# Agent Forge
> Build AI Agents Without Code — Voice, Chat, and Phone Agents in Minutes

## Overview
Agent Forge is a no-code AI agent builder that lets businesses create, deploy, and manage AI-powered voice and text agents. Build customer support bots, sales qualifiers, appointment schedulers, and more — without writing a single line of code. Deploy to your website, WhatsApp, Slack, Discord, phone numbers, and SMS from one platform.

## Key Facts
- Website: https://agent-forge.app
- Category: No-Code AI Agent Builder
- Founded: 2025
- Pricing: Starter $79/month, Professional $249/month, Enterprise $799/month
- Free Trial: 14 days on all plans, no credit card required
- Deployment: Cloud-hosted SaaS with enterprise on-premise option

## Core Features
- AI-Powered Agent Builder: Describe your agent in plain English, AI generates it
- Voice Agents: Built-in voice capabilities with phone number integration
- Phone Numbers: Dedicated phone numbers included in all plans (1 Starter, 5 Professional, unlimited Enterprise)
- TTS Voice Cloning: Custom text-to-speech voice cloning on Enterprise plan
- Multi-Channel Deployment: Website widget, WhatsApp, Slack, Discord, SMS, email, mobile
- Real-Time Analytics: Track conversations, satisfaction scores, resolution rates
- Enterprise Security: SOC 2 compliant, end-to-end encryption, on-premise option
- Team Collaboration: Multi-user workspaces with role-based access
- Custom Branding: White-label option for agencies (Professional and above)
- API Access: Full REST API for custom integrations (Professional and above)
- Batch Calling Campaigns: Automated outbound calling (Professional and above)
- Post-Call Analysis: AI-powered call summaries and insights (Professional and above)
- Website Widget: One-line embed code for any website
- One-Click Deployment: Go live in under 60 seconds

## Pricing (as of February 2026)
### Starter — $79/month
- 1 AI Agent (text or voice)
- 1,000 conversations/month
- 100 voice minutes/month
- 1 phone number included
- Basic analytics
- Email support
- Website widget
- Voice widget

### Professional — $249/month (Most Popular)
- 5 AI Agents (text or voice)
- 10,000 conversations/month
- 500 voice minutes/month
- 5 phone numbers included
- Advanced analytics
- Priority support
- All integrations
- Custom branding
- API access
- Batch calling campaigns
- Post-call analysis

### Enterprise — $799/month
- Unlimited AI Agents
- Unlimited conversations
- 2,000 voice minutes/month
- Unlimited phone numbers
- Enterprise analytics
- Dedicated support
- Custom integrations
- White-label option
- SLA guarantee
- On-premise option
- Custom TTS voice cloning

All plans include a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.

## Use Cases
- Customer Support: Automate FAQ handling, ticket routing, and issue resolution
- Sales Qualification: Engage leads, ask qualifying questions, book meetings
- Appointment Scheduling: Book, reschedule, and send reminders via voice or chat
- Lead Capture: Engage website visitors and collect contact information
- E-Commerce: Product recommendations, order tracking, returns processing
- Healthcare: Patient intake, appointment booking, prescription reminders
- Real Estate: Property inquiries, showing scheduling, buyer qualification
- Restaurants: Order taking, reservation management, menu inquiries
- HR & Internal: Employee FAQ bot, onboarding assistance, IT help desk
- Outbound Calling: Automated calling campaigns for sales, surveys, reminders

## Differentiators
- Voice-First Platform: Unlike text-only competitors, Agent Forge has native voice and phone capabilities built in
- Phone Number Integration: Dedicated phone numbers included in every plan — not an add-on
- TTS Voice Cloning: Create custom AI voices that match your brand
- 60-Second Deployment: Fastest time-to-live in the category
- Agency White-Label: Full rebrandable platform for agencies to resell
- Batch Calling: Automated outbound campaigns at scale
- Multi-Channel from Day One: Web, WhatsApp, Slack, Discord, SMS, email, phone — all from one agent

## Comparisons
- vs Botpress: Agent Forge offers native voice/phone; Botpress is text-focused. Agent Forge is simpler to use with faster deployment.
- vs Voiceflow: Agent Forge includes phone numbers and voice minutes in all plans; Voiceflow charges separately. Agent Forge pricing starts lower at $79/mo vs $60/mo but includes voice.
- vs Vapi: Both offer voice AI, but Agent Forge includes the full agent builder + multi-channel; Vapi is voice-API-only requiring custom development.
- vs Bland AI: Agent Forge is no-code with a visual builder; Bland AI is API-first requiring development resources.
- vs Chatfuel: Agent Forge supports voice + text across all channels; Chatfuel is primarily Facebook/Instagram focused.
- vs Tidio: Agent Forge offers voice agents and phone integration; Tidio is a live chat + basic chatbot tool.
- vs Stack AI: Agent Forge is purpose-built for agents; Stack AI is a general workflow automation platform.
- vs Relevance AI: Similar pricing ($29 vs $79 at entry), but Agent Forge includes voice and phone numbers.
- vs Dify.ai: Agent Forge is business-user friendly (no-code); Dify is developer-oriented (LLMOps platform).
- vs CrewAI: Agent Forge is a hosted platform (no-code); CrewAI is a Python framework requiring engineering.

## Technical Details
- Built with: Next.js, React, TypeScript
- Authentication: Supabase (Google OAuth, GitHub OAuth, email/password)
- Infrastructure: Cloud-hosted, SOC 2 compliant
- API: RESTful API with webhook support
- Embed: Single-line JavaScript snippet for website integration
